title: MULTIPLE IF STATEMENTS formula not working

posts.author: tcalise (Tamara Vehige Calise)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am new to Monday.com and I am trying to insert a multiple if statement. Depending on the household size, I want to put an amount in the next column. What am I doing wrong?

IF(AND({HOUSEHOLD SIZE} >5, “$37.50”,
IF(AND({HOUSEHOLD SIZE} <3, “$12.50”,
IF(AND({HOUSEHOLD SIZE} =3, “$25.00”,
IF(AND({HOUSEHOLD SIZE} =4, “$25.00”))))))

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml:
Tamara Vehige Calise:

IF(AND({HOUSEHOLD SIZE} >5, “$37.50”,
IF(AND({HOUSEHOLD SIZE} <3, “$12.50”,
IF(AND({HOUSEHOLD SIZE} =3, “$25.00”,
IF(AND({HOUSEHOLD SIZE} =4, “$25.00”))))))

I think that the right formula would be
IF({HOUSEHOLD SIZE}>4, “$37.50”,
(IF({HOUSEHOLD SIZE}<3, “$12.50”,
(IF({HOUSEHOLD SIZE}=3, “$25.00”,
(IF({HOUSEHOLD SIZE}=4, “$25.00”))
))
))
)
